## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cargo test`, `npm test` as applicable)
- [ ] Financial invariants preserved (if touching payment flows)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/domains/<domain>/` and `BANZA_REFERENCE.md` if public-facing)
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): description` convention
- [ ] If API contracts changed, conformance vectors updated in `contracts/sdk-certification/`
- [ ] Database migrations are reversible (if applicable)
